title: hieracium caesium subsp. inversum
intro: Hieracium caesium subsp. inversum, also known as the lesser hawkweed, is a plant species within the dandelion family and is characterized by its bright yellow flowers and fern-like leaves. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation, due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Hieracium caesium subsp. inversum include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve gut health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
